mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rate-hiking periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending demand contraction, triggering risk-off positioning that drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment acceleration signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous high inflation readings and elevated policy rates create a real rate shock that crushes equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with a directional accuracy exceeding 55% over a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and healthy supply-side dynamics, which supports corporate profit margins and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 during periods where INDPRO growth exceeds 1.0% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing retail sales volumes reflect sustained consumer spending power, which directly boosts corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns in months with rising RSAFS are not statistically higher than months with falling RSAFS (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A collapse in housing starts signals a sharp contraction in business investment and consumer confidence, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings revisions turn downward.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns remain positive in more than 50% of instances where housing starts drop below the 1.3 million threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Strong non-farm payroll growth combined with a stable or declining unemployment rate confirms a healthy labor market expansion, reducing recession risk premiums and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative directional accuracy below 50% over a 3-year rolling walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation exceeds 7.0%, the Federal Reserve is forced into aggressive tightening, causing immediate equity volatility and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets price in higher discount rates.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of instances where inflation breaches the 7.0% threshold despite rate hikes.
